opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter long on dip to 67000-69500 if BTC holds above 63k support; or on clean 4h close above 71k for breakout entry.
opportunities.rationale: BTC has rallied from ~67k to ~69,883, confirming strength as the risk complex stabilises post-VIX spike. Macro risk-off (VIX 24.9) caps upside but BTC is outperforming high-beta alts. Target 77k on trend continuation. Invalidated if risk-off accelerates and BTC breaks below 63k.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter near 1960-2000 if price holds 1900 on next correction and BTC is stable above 67k.
opportunities.rationale: ETH recovered to ~$2,028 from prior lows. Risk/reward is acceptable for a small swing position but conviction is low given ETH's underperformance vs BTC YTD and macro headwinds. Position size kept minimal.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on a daily or clean 4h close above 70,500 with volume expansion; invalidate if price loses 67,000 support on a daily close.
opportunities.rationale: BTC trading around 69,883 and pressing the 70k-70.5k psychological resistance zone. A convincing breakout with strong volume in the absence of new macro shocks supports continuation toward the 72k-77k resistance band. BTC is outperforming high-beta alts in the current high-vol regime, reinforcing the breakout thesis over alternatives.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Stagger entries between 67,000-69,000 on dips, provided daily closes remain above 65,000 and macro risk-off does not accelerate. Invalidate on daily close below 65,000.
opportunities.rationale: 67,000 and 65,000 are key BTC support zones, with resistance at 70,500-77,000. In a regime where BTC is outperforming alts and broader risk assets, buying controlled dips into the 67k area with tight invalidation under 65k offers a clean R:R toward the upper resistance band. Complements the breakout setup above as a lower-entry alternative.
